column1: # mapping_set_title: Kobo Record 136 to Schema.org Dataset Mapping
# mapping_set_description: SSSOM mapping from KoboToolbox record 136 raw JSON to Gaia Catalog JSON-LD.

column13: comment
Each Kobo submission becomes one Schema.org Dataset.
Kobo title is the Schema.org Dataset name.
Dataset abstract or description.
DOI is a formal dataset identifier.
Dataset landing page URL.
Kobo stores cc_by; target should use a full license URI where possible.
Language code.
Publication date.
Last data update.
Kobo has creator name as text; Schema.org creator should ideally be an Organization or Person object.
Kobo has publisher name as text; Schema.org publisher should ideally be an Organization object.
Kobo has place name and GeoNames metadata; Schema.org spatialCoverage should ideally be a Place object.
Subject terms are discoverability keywords.
Kobo select_multiple returns a space-separated string.
Vector/table/raster structure; no perfect Schema.org direct field.
GIS geometry type.
Coordinate reference system code.
Source download URL becomes Schema.org DataDownload contentUrl.
Gaia/PostGIS table name is operational metadata.
zip should become application/zip or remain as source extension.
shp describes the source data format.
Update frequency maps to Dublin Core accrual periodicity.
Each cartography attribute becomes a variableMeasured PropertyValue object.
